data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Enhanced account security for users and employees via MFA techniques including OTP and authenticator apps.
data.technical_spec: Requires verification through two or more authentication factors.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data and streaming content are encrypted during transmission and storage.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS protocols for data in transit and AES encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Centralized platform to monitor, detect, and respond to security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates real-time analytics and alerts to preemptively address vulnerabilities.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning & Patching
data.description: Regular scanning for vulnerabilities and deploying patches to protect against exploits.
data.technical_spec: Automated tools and manual reviews to ensure up-to-date security patches.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Measures to safeguard against distributed denial-of-service attacks, keeping service operational.
data.technical_spec: Employ technologies such as traffic filtering and rate limiting to mitigate attacks.
